name: agentic-sop-to-work
description: Loop Engineering for Claude Code agent loops — deterministic bounded termination (stall + budget), observable health, and bounded state. Ships agentic-sop-kit (human SOP → controlled loop) plus cross-domain review companions: Second Opinion (honesty reviewer), alcoa-guard (ALCOA+ data-integrity), plugin-forge (plugin linter/scaffolder).

plugins.name: agentic-sop-kit
plugins.description: Human-SOP → agentic-workflow methodology: agentic-sop + agentic-workflow-audit skills, the /sop-flow command, a project-scoped Stop-hook regression gate, and the bundled portable kit.

plugins.name: second-opinion-honesty
plugins.description: Independent adversarial honesty reviewer: scrutinizes a DRAFT output's claims-vs-evidence (no fabrication / overreach / invented IDs) before a human approves. Snaps onto agentic-sop-kit run dirs (FULL, uses the trace) or reviews any plain document (DEGRADED). Deterministic checks + a capped advisory LLM pass; the report is a DRAFT — the human owns the verdict.

plugins.name: alcoa-guard
plugins.description: Deterministic ALCOA+ data-integrity linter: checks Attributable / Contemporaneous / Complete / Accurate / Consistent in code and surfaces the human-judgment slice as a 【待補】 checklist it never auto-concludes. DEGRADED lints any CSV/JSON record against a declared contract; FULL snaps onto an agentic-sop-kit run dir. The report is a DRAFT — the human owns the verdict. Pure stdlib.

plugins.name: plugin-forge
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin linter + scaffolder: `lint` validates a plugin or whole marketplace against a house grammar (a strict superset of the manifest/frontmatter checks plus stdlib-only, hook-protocol, and test-harness invariants); `scaffold` generates a grammar-conformant plugin skeleton. Pure stdlib; self-hosting; standalone on any plugin.
